body: Hi, this is William from Marceau Solutions. {business_name} has only {review_count} reviews - most customers check reviews before calling. Just helped 3 Naples businesses go from 10 → 50+ reviews in 30 days. Want details? (239) 398-5676. Reply STOP to opt out.
notes: Focuses on review count/reputation. Requires review_count field.

variants.body: Hi {business_name}! William from Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). Great service but only {review_count} reviews? We helped 3 local businesses get 40+ reviews in 30 days. 85% of customers check reviews first. Interested? Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.

Do you lose customers because {business_name} has few reviews? Most check Google/Yelp before calling. We helped 3 Naples businesses go from 10 → 50+ reviews fast. William, Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). Reply STOP to opt out.
